ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project category */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project category (e.g., Python) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the project category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the project category was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project category (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project category */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section (e.g., Numerical Libraries & Data Structures) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the section */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the section was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the section was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the section (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "maintainer_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for maintaining the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_maintainer_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintainer_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the section the library belongs to */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library */,
  "last_commit" TEXT /* Date of the last commit */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the library's homepage or documentation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the library */,
  "github" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the library is hosted on GitHub */,
  "cran" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the library is available on CRAN (for R packages) */,
  "repo" TEXT /* Repository name or path */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the library was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the library was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the library (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the library is distributed */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Number of stars the library has on its repository */,
  "forks" INTEGER /* Number of forks the library has on its repository */,
  "issues_count" INTEGER /* Number of open issues for the library */,
  "pull_requests_count" INTEGER /* Number of open pull requests for the library */,
  "maintainer_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for maintaining the library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_libraries_maintainer_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintainer_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_libraries_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, maintainer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "registration_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user registered */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_library_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the library */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library being interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, download, fork) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the interaction was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the interaction was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the interaction occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_library_interactions_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_library_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "library_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the library */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog or release notes for the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., released, beta, deprecated) */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the version */,
  "changelog_url" TEXT /* URL to the changelog or release notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_library_versions_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library that depends on another library */,
  "dependent_library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library being depended on */,
  "version_constraint" TEXT /* Version constraint for the dependency (e.g., >=1.0.0) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the dependency was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the dependency was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dependency (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_dependent_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library the documentation belongs to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of documentation (e.g., user guide, API reference) */,
  "doc_url" TEXT /* URL to the documentation */,
  "doc_content" TEXT /* Content of the documentation (e.g., text, HTML) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the documentation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the documentation was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the documentation (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "last_updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_last_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
